message:
fix(robustness): address multiple reliability and validation issues

- analytics.ts: Fix visitCount NaN vulnerability when localStorage is corrupted
  by adding Number.isFinite() check before using parsed value
- third-party-scripts.tsx: Add length validation (6-20 chars) to Clarity
  project ID validator to prevent excessively long strings
- tracked-link.tsx: Wrap analytics calls in try-catch to ensure link
  navigation always works even if analytics fails
- tldr-tool-card.tsx: Fix ESLint setState-in-effect error by using ref
  instead of state for touch device detection (no re-render needed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
